article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service

briefs.title: Liquor Primary licensees can now offer bottle service — no application needed
briefs.summary: BC has updated its liquor rules to allow Liquor Primary establishments (bars, nightclubs, and similar venues) to sell and serve a full bottle of spirits as a bottle service experience. The change takes effect automatically for all Liquor Primary licensees — no application or approval is required.
briefs.action_required: Review and follow the new bottle service rules: serving size limits, last-hour sales ban, and storage requirements.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service
